coculture_LD.name: Alteromonas MIT1002 cluster coculture_LD (diel periodic)
coculture_LD.temporal_pattern: Alteromonas genes showing 24-h periodicity in coculture under diel light:dark conditions. The paper reports 13% of all Alteromonas genes exhibited 24-h periodicity in coculture.
coculture_LD.confidence_notes: Original extraction incorrectly attributed Prochlorococcus photosynthesis genes to Alteromonas MIT1002.

supporting_quotes.quote: Transcripts from 13% of all Alteromonas genes exhibited 24-h periodicity when grown on a diel L:D cycle in coculture with Prochlorococcus.

coculture_LD.assessment_notes: Paper provides no functional enrichment detail for Alteromonas periodic genes.

coculture_LD+coculture_darkness.name: Alteromonas MIT1002 cluster coculture_LD+coculture_darkness (periodic across conditions)
coculture_LD+coculture_darkness.temporal_pattern: Two Alteromonas genes maintaining 24-h periodicity in coculture under both diel and extended darkness conditions.
coculture_LD+coculture_darkness.confidence_notes: Only 2 genes in this category; paper provides no functional detail for them.
coculture_LD+coculture_darkness.assessment_notes: Too few genes for meaningful functional characterization.

coculture_darkness.name: Alteromonas MIT1002 cluster coculture_darkness
coculture_darkness.confidence_notes: Paper does not discuss this specific periodicity category for Alteromonas.
coculture_darkness.assessment_notes: Original extraction incorrectly used Prochlorococcus quotes for an Alteromonas cluster.
